description: Outbound asks tracker from the waiting-on-tracker orchestration (mail-only v1). One entry with a stable id (re-published in place each run) listing every open ask grouped by recipient, with three per-ask buttons: Resolved (mark-ledger-item.ps1 -Action completed), Dismiss (-Action dismissed), and Not an ask (flag-as-not-an-ask.ps1, which both dismisses the entry AND records a recipient+pattern in the ask-extraction-ignore trainer so future runs filter near-duplicates). Pinned when any urgent asks are outstanding. Companion daily summary lives at the Zakira category `waiting-on-ledger:daily-summary` for the future daily-morning-digest composer. A weekly Monday-only Obsidian digest under `OrcStra/Waiting On/<YYYY-Wnn>.md` captures closures and still-outstanding asks.

contentTemplate.label: Urgent waiting-on
contentTemplate.description: Use level 'warning' when any urgent-priority asks are outstanding; omit otherwise. Body bullets the top 5 urgent items with recipient name, ask text, and age in hours.

contentTemplate.title: <recipient-name> <recipient-address>
contentTemplate.description: One nested section per recipient with at least one open ask, sorted by ask count (desc) then by age (oldest first). Each recipient section contains a leading markdown summary ('N open ask(s) for this recipient.') and then per-ask nested sections. Inside each per-ask section: a keyValue with Sent / Age / Priority / Signal / Subject / Open thread, and three CLI actions (Resolved / Dismiss / Not an ask). onSuccess=keep so a single-button click does not archive the whole entry. Capped at 10 asks per recipient; surplus rendered as 'Plus N more not shown - they will appear once the older ones close out.'

contentTemplate.label: Recipient summary
contentTemplate.description: Bold 'N open ask(s) for this recipient.' line.

contentTemplate.title: [<priority>] <ask text>
contentTemplate.description: One nested section per open ask. Contains a keyValue with Sent / Age (hours) / Priority / Signal / Subject / Open thread, and three CLI actions: Resolved, Dismiss, Not an ask. The Not an ask button carries a confirmMessage so a misclick does not silently train the classifier.

contentTemplate.label: Run Notes
contentTemplate.description: Free-form footer with the run id, dryRun and forceSurface flags.

expectedActions.label: Open Outlook (Sent)
expectedActions.description: Jump to the Outlook web Sent folder.

expectedActions.label: Open Orchestra: Waiting On list in To Do
expectedActions.description: Convenience link to the Microsoft To Do list this orchestration syncs aging asks into.

expectedActions.label: Open Waiting On folder
expectedActions.description: Open the Obsidian Waiting On folder where the weekly digests live.

expectedActions.label: Dismiss
expectedActions.description: Archive this run snapshot. The next scheduler tick will re-publish a fresh one under the same stable id.
